settings.title: Reduces hair fall in 4 weeks
settings.desc: Clinical studies show significant reduction in hair fall with consistent use.

settings.title: Strengthens hair roots from within
settings.desc: Bhringraj and Brahmi nourish the follicles at the root level.

settings.title: Promotes new growth
settings.desc: Amla stimulates dormant follicles and encourages new hair growth.

settings.title: Warm the oil
settings.desc: Gently warm 2–3 ml of oil between your palms or in a small bowl of hot water.

settings.title: Apply to scalp
settings.desc: Part your hair and apply directly to the scalp with fingertips. Massage in circular motions for 5–10 minutes.

settings.title: Leave for 2+ hours
settings.desc: For best results, leave overnight. Cover with a warm towel if desired.

settings.title: Wash with mild shampoo
settings.desc: Use a sulphate-free or mild herbal shampoo. Repeat 2–3 times per week.

settings.question: How soon will I see results?
settings.answer: Most customers see noticeable improvement in 4–6 weeks with consistent use 2–3 times per week.

settings.question: Is this product safe for colour-treated hair?
settings.answer: Yes. All our oils use natural, non-stripping ingredients that are safe for chemically treated hair.

settings.question: Can I use this during pregnancy?
settings.answer: Please consult your doctor before using any Ayurvedic product during pregnancy. We recommend our free Vaidya consultation.
